[2018-04-10 21:26] 1000mh (Henry): I agree that there have been users posting messages that should be considered spam that were not dealt with. I'll personally pay closer attention to that channel to keep it more productive than it was.
[2018-04-10 21:27] 1000mh (Henry): Sorry it hasn't been being done until now
[2018-04-10 21:27] mrguy888: No fun allowed has never been a rule. If things are not getting in the way of discussion and not otherwise doing harm then I think complaints aren't quite warrented.
[2018-04-10 21:28] http404error: @mrguy888 The warning and moderation didn't occur until I specifically prompted it.
[2018-04-10 21:28] mrguy888: Sorry for not living on discord.
[2018-04-10 21:28] http404error: That's fine, but I don't understand why you're arguing against my complaints in that case.
[2018-04-10 21:29] http404error: I'm tired of getting lip from moderators.
[2018-04-10 21:29] http404error: It's really disillusioning.
[2018-04-10 21:29] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): are we really getting 2 new units per day? I mean, I don't like that type of content, so good for him/her. Seems excessive though.
[2018-04-10 21:30] 1000mh (Henry): Nice save @jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer). Very woke ;P
[2018-04-10 21:31] david6553 (Epicurus): I guess I just don't understand why the umbrella message was spam?
[2018-04-10 21:32] http404error: Look forward to my new design tomorrow when I can post again! It's this and that and the other thing!
[2018-04-10 21:32] http404error: Seems to just be circumvention to me
[2018-04-10 21:32] liadahlia (Lia): i'm on the mod's side with this one
[2018-04-10 21:32] liadahlia (Lia): i mod for another server too and it's not so black and white
[2018-04-10 21:32] http404error: It's not the best example, just what I could find
[2018-04-10 21:33] http404error: The emote spam was really what I was complaining about
[2018-04-10 21:34] http404error: There have actually been substantial discussions in the past week, which is nice
[2018-04-10 21:34] liadahlia (Lia): does seem to be excessive yes
[2018-04-10 21:34] liadahlia (Lia): but well blaqk did come in with a warning
[2018-04-10 21:34] david6553 (Epicurus): I'm also happy for people to ping me or dm me if they think there's something happening that needs mod attention. I'm sometimes pretty bad with following all the channels
[2018-04-10 21:35] mrguy888: People are allowed to react to things. I don't think the emotes are against any rules.
[2018-04-10 21:35] http404error: Just for reference, the warning was issued because I came here to complain about it. This is an extension of the same discussion that spawned.
[2018-04-10 21:36] http404error: Responding to everything with "can't be assed", even sarcastically, is stupid
[2018-04-10 21:36] liadahlia (Lia): yeah i think it's fine to get mod's attention
[2018-04-10 21:36] http404error: I get that it's an inside joke pointed at cooledcannon, mind you
[2018-04-10 21:42] http404error: I mean, I'm okay with the high-level concept that Discord can just be like Twitch chat
[2018-04-10 21:43] http404error: Disposable, memey, and vapid
[2018-04-10 21:43] http404error: I just have appreciated the substantial discussions
[2018-04-10 21:43] http404error: Of which there have been many
[2018-04-10 21:45] http404error: I just think that *if it's okay* to have exchanges composed of the "idea->mockery->meme" cycle all the time, then there is no salvation for the channel
[2018-04-10 21:45] liadahlia (Lia): memes is just part of the internet
[2018-04-10 21:45] liadahlia (Lia): gotta get used to that
[2018-04-10 21:47] 1000mh (Henry): Just for some transparency, we are having a discussion about this to see how we could do better
[2018-04-10 21:48] http404error: Well, thanks again for that.
[2018-04-10 21:48] 1000mh (Henry): I would very much like for everyone to feel welcome but I know that some users will have different boundaries when it comes to certain types of discussions. We are going to try to find a good middle-ground.
[2018-04-10 21:51] http404error: I don't even care so much personally, I just know that many users ignore the channel because of the issues with it and that makes me sad.
[2018-04-10 21:52] http404error: The Reddit threads seem to be fine though so I will be content even if I just have to migrate my attention there
[2018-04-10 21:52] http404error: Also I only just realized that they're getting stickied, which I appreciate :)
[2018-04-10 21:52] mrguy888: I don't think people who ignore the chat based on its current form would participate if ssp was banned.
[2018-04-10 21:53] awaclus: I personally ignore the channel because I don't care about fan designs
[2018-04-10 21:53] mrguy888: Before the 2 a day rule, yeah it was bad in there.
[2018-04-10 21:54] http404error: I'm not trying to raise the question of a ban
[2018-04-10 21:54] http404error: Obviously it's fine to have that position, @Awaclus, that doesn't bother me at all.
[2018-04-10 21:55] http404error: The rule has helped, I agree.
[2018-04-10 21:55] mrguy888: I only say ban because all of ssp's posts are low quality and he is pretty much the source of all the low quality posts int here.
[2018-04-10 21:55] mrguy888: So ban is a theoretical world where there are no low quality posts.
[2018-04-10 21:58] http404error: I don't necessarily agree with the assumption there but I guess we're at least talking on the same frequency then
[2018-04-10 21:59] http404error: You know, I think you're probably right. Most users who I'm thinking of would probably just be happier to track the reddit threads that spawn from discussions, or the challenges
[2018-04-10 21:59] http404error: It's really time-consuming keeping up with a chat and it's probably impossible to prune it enough to be able to catch up regularly.
